name: Jane

reviews.comment: Jane's lessons were very helpful. I made good progress.
Jane is an amazing teacher! She is patient and supportive.

lesson_info: Lessons are structured to cover grammar, vocabulary, and practical usage of the language.
conditions: Welcomes both adult learners and teenagers (13 years and above).
experience: Jane is an experienced and dedicated language teacher specializing in German and French. She holds a Bachelor's degree in German Studies and a Master's degree in French Literature. Her passion for languages and teaching has driven her to become a highly proficient and knowledgeable instructor. With over 10 years of teaching experience, Jane has helped numerous students of various backgrounds and proficiency levels achieve their language learning goals. She is skilled at adapting her teaching methods to suit the needs and learning styles of her students, ensuring that they feel supported and motivated throughout their language journey.

name: David

reviews.comment: David explains things clearly and is knowledgeable in the subject.
David's teaching style didn't suit me, but he is still a good teacher.

lesson_info: Lessons focus on developing all four language skills: speaking, listening, reading, and writing.
conditions: Teaches all age groups, including children, teenagers, and adults.
Offers group lessons at discounted rates.
experience: David has been teaching Mandarin Chinese for 4 years. He has a passion for language teaching and is dedicated to helping his students succeed. With a solid understanding of the language and culture, David ensures that his lessons are both informative and enjoyable.

name: Sarah

reviews.comment: Sarah is a patient and helpful teacher. I enjoyed her lessons.
Sarah's teaching style is engaging and effective. Highly recommended.

lesson_info: Lessons focus on building conversational skills and grammar knowledge.
conditions: Teaches adults and teenagers (15 years and above).
experience: Sarah has been teaching English for 6 years. She has worked with students from diverse backgrounds and understands the challenges they face while learning a new language. Her teaching approach emphasizes practical communication skills and ensures a supportive and engaging learning environment.

name: Michael

reviews.comment: Michael is a fantastic teacher with deep knowledge of both Spanish and Italian.
Great lessons, Michael is well-prepared and very organized.

lesson_info: Lessons cover both grammar and conversational practice tailored to your goals.
conditions: Teaches adult learners and teenagers (14 years and above).
Specialized in business language and travel preparation.
experience: Michael has 12 years of teaching experience and lived in both Spain and Italy. His immersive approach and cultural insights make his lessons engaging and effective for all proficiency levels.

name: Emily

reviews.comment: Emily is a wonderful teacher, always encouraging and patient.
I learned a lot during our sessions. Highly recommend Emily.

lesson_info: Lessons are interactive and focused on practical communication.
conditions: Suitable for kids, teenagers, and adults.
experience: Emily is a certified language instructor with 8 years of experience. She has a Bachelor's in English Literature and a TEFL certificate. Her passion is helping students gain confidence in real-world conversations.

name: Nataliia

reviews.comment: Nataliia's lessons are well-structured and very engaging.
Excellent teacher! Helped me with the language and culture.

lesson_info: Comprehensive lessons covering grammar, pronunciation, and cultural context.
conditions: Welcomes complete beginners and advanced students.
Provides supplementary materials and homework feedback.
experience: Nataliia is a native Ukrainian speaker fluent in Polish, with a Master's in Slavic linguistics. She has been teaching for 9 years and specializes in helping students with both languages relocating to Eastern Europe.

name: Hyun

reviews.comment: Hyun makes learning Korean fun and accessible.
Lessons are well paced and engaging.

lesson_info: Lessons emphasize practical conversation and cultural context.
conditions: Customized lesson plans based on learner goals.
experience: Hyun is a native Korean speaker with a degree in Korean language education. With 5 years of teaching experience, she focuses on practical communication skills and Korean culture.

name: Pierre

reviews.comment: Pierre is knowledgeable and great with advanced students.
Best French teacher I've worked with so far.

lesson_info: Advanced lessons focused on fluency, business communication and exam preparation.
conditions: Best suited for intermediate to proficient learners.
experience: Pierre is a native French speaker who has lived in Paris and London. With a Master's in Applied Linguistics, he has been teaching for 11 years and helps learners refine their language to a professional level.
